---
layout: default
title: "Election Schedules, Legislative Reforms, and Diplomatic Outreach"
date: 2026-07-06T17:18:48.046760+00:00
summary: "The ECI announces key by-election schedules while Parliament debates major electoral reforms and the government advances its regional diplomatic agenda"
run_time_ist: "10:48PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:48PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Election schedules:</strong> The Election Commission of India has notified by-elections for various Assembly seats in Bihar, Gujarat, and Madhya Pradesh on July 30, alongside Rajya Sabha by-polls in West Bengal scheduled for July 24.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google._?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative overhaul:</strong> Parliament is currently debating significant electoral reforms, including the Delimitation Bill, 2026, which proposes increasing Lok Sabha seats from 543 to 850, and the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, which has now been passed.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I18</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE5NUmxlOFYxbkc2bWdTWkJmUjZYb0otV2c5VGVld2poazVEVGlRdWJjUjFmT181cFg5Nnc1VXRnZ3BWOVNjQzd2TWkxYndybkNxdnVjZGs0UmtsODlDVmpEYVMwZmVhZDJRanprU0R0bDllbW0yUm1hZ1lyXzk?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial intervention:</strong> The Supreme Court is set to hear a plea regarding the Karur stampede case, which alleges that Tamil Nadu ministers are attempting to influence witnesses.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Diplomatic mission:</strong> Prime Minister Narendra Modi has embarked on a three-nation tour to Indonesia, Australia, and New Zealand to strengthen India&#x27;s &quot;Act East Policy&quot; and the MAHASAGAR vision.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiygFBVV95cUxQYkJnSktVMFpnMHRpNjR5Z2w0TXVkZU1qcHVvQlpXdUM1TlU1dkgzdm5nejVWdGRYckNNSGVCTnRnOHZnYVZCUVNKZXlVYXpDWUdZaE9lTnoya1lpZWVkMjUtbWtTMWV3aXZ2VlRNTjdoUUw5VUUzS3Q4UkR5QzgxSE15SGR2NkVUZGl1aERuVGhmdmRIRFpaYTVLamxJaW5sTWNtOTE5N1g2TElrdGdFczU2U2JHYUJhYWp3TVF1LUtXbHRYOVpvLWpR?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political governance:</strong> Union Home Minister Amit Shah has defended the BJP&#x27;s governance in West Bengal, asserting that the party is actively fulfilling its election manifesto promises to achieve &quot;Sonar Bangla.&quot;<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W14</a></span></li>
</ul>
